problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: If Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix is applied to types, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
